show running-config

!Time: Thu Apr 09 15:30:00.000 UTC
Building configuration...
! no configuration change since last restart
! Last configuration change at Thu Apr 09 2024 by admin
: Written by admin at Thu Apr 09 2024
hostname router-xr01
!
enable password cisco123
enable secret 5 $1$abc$XYZ123456789
!
username admin secret 5 $1$abc$ADMINSECRET
username guest password 7 0822455D
username guest password 0 cleartextpw
username operator password 5 $1$def$HASHEDPWD
!
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/0/0
 description Uplink to core
 ip address 10.0.0.1 255.255.255.0
 ip ospf authentication-key myospfkey
 ip ospf message-digest-key 1 md5 mymd5key
!
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/0/1
 description Management
 password mylinepw
 secret mylinesecret
!
router bgp 65001
 neighbor 10.0.0.2 password bgpsecret
!
snmp-server community public RO
snmp-server community private RW
snmp-server host 10.0.0.100 public version 2c
snmp-server host 10.0.0.101 traps version 3 noauth mycommunity
!
crypto isakmp key myisakmpkey address 10.0.0.2
!
standby 1 authentication standbypw
!
ntp authentication-key 1 md5 ntpkey123
ntp clock-period 36029380
!
tftp-server flash bogusfile.bin
!
set session-key inbound ah 100 myahkey
set session-key inbound esp 100 authenticator myespkey
!
$Revision: 1.2 $
$Id: config.cfg,v 1.3 2024/01/01 00:00:00 admin Exp $
!
fair-queue individual-limit
!
clockrate 64000
!
isis password myisiskey level-1
 domain-password mydomainkey level-1
 area-password myareapassword level-1
!
tacacs-server host 10.0.0.50 key mytacacskey
radius-server host 10.0.0.51 key myradiuskey
!
pre-shared-key mypresharedkey
 key mykey
 failover key myfailoverkey
!
vpdn username vpdnuser password vpdnpw
!
ppp chap password 7 04580F0A2C46
ftp client password ftpadminpw
!
 cable shared-secret cablesecret
!

syscon password sysconsecret
!
 l2tp tunnel l2tp password l2tppw
